title: How a Godly Man Chooses His Brothers
caption:
Most men have followers, not brothers.

There is a difference.

A brother has your real number — and he uses it. Not to hype your highlights. To call when your posts stop and ask if you're okay. He knows when something's off because he's been paying attention long enough to notice.

He's allowed to ask the hard question. About the private tab, the skipped church, the third drink. You gave him that access on purpose. That's the whole point.

And he shows up when it costs him something. Not when it's convenient. When you're a mess and it's hard to be around you. Most men find out who their brothers are in the hard season.

Here's the thing nobody tells you: the brotherhood you want doesn't come to you. You build it by being the guy who calls first, who asks the hard question, who shows up when it costs you.

"There is a friend who sticks closer than a brother." — Proverbs 18:24

Tag the brother who already is one.

#faith #christianmen #brotherhood #godlymen #manofgod #accountability #disciplemaking #mensministry #christianity #scripture
